ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company that developed the software */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "first_release_year" INTEGER /* Year when the software was first released */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the software was developed */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* License type (e.g., Proprietary, Nonfree, Trialware) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the software product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the software */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "operational_restrictions" TEXT /* Any operational restrictions or compliance issues */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer support */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "support_website" TEXT /* URL for the support website */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average user rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the software is recommended by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product it belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., On-demand scan, Firewall) */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability of the feature in the software (true/false) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_version" TEXT /* Version of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note regarding the software */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who added the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_notes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
